name: The Star - Marceline
description:
Before Marceline's birth, Elise was a human woman and joined a cult - The Cult Of The Night, they attempted to summon King of the Nightosphere, Hunson Abadeer, but surprisingly, it worked.

Hunson and Elise got together that night, but Hunson was sent back to the Nightosphere the next day.

Marcy was born later in 2003, and didn't go to school on account of being a half demon. 

After 2010, the destructive and nuclear Mushroom War happened, Ooozers (zombie like beings) populated the destroyed ruins of the city.

Marcy was told to go to a safe house by her dying mother, and did so, in 2013, she explored the outside and found the corpse of a man, there, she was found by the Vampire King.

She was bit willingly at 22, and turned half Vampire half demon by the Vampire King, and became his Ward. Sucking souls of other Vampires for fun.

Gained the powers of levitation, invisibility, hypnosis, shapeshifting, raising the dead and rapid healing.
creator: bobabthan
